description: Copper is a CRM built for Google Workspace that centralizes contacts, tracks deals, and automates follow-ups inside Gmail, Calendar, and Drive.
overview: Copper is a CRM that works natively with Google Workspace, organizing contacts, tracking deals, and automating tasks and reporting from inside Gmail, Calendar, and Drive.
what_is: Copper is a CRM designed around Google Workspace. Its deep Gmail, Calendar, and Drive integration suits teams that live in Google, keeping customer info and communication in one place without leaving the inbox.

It is strongest at pipeline management, client relationships, and workflow automation, with quick activation and a free trial. Sales, consulting, and project teams use it to move from lead capture through closing and delivery.

Copper sits in the stack as a Gmail-centered CRM with strong email integration and automated follow-ups and reporting. It is not built for complex ERP or heavy customization; it suits teams wanting a user-friendly, Google-native CRM.
